overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a sunny Mediterranean waterfront in a game engine, approaching and circumnavigating a large historic stone building along gravel and sandy paths. The clip features clear skies, calm waters, and lush summer vegetation with no other people or vehicles present.

scene_state.functional_zone: gravel waterfront path with tree line

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a gravel path toward a large historic building with calm water on the right and trees on the left

entered.detail: multi-story stone building with shuttered windows dominating the forward view
single-story yellow structure with flat roof among the trees
lush green deciduous trees lining the left side of the path
tranquil body of water reflecting the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a peaceful approach along a gravel waterfront path on a sunny day. A large historic stone building dominates the forward view while a small yellow structure sits among trees on the left. The calm water reflects the clear sky on the right as the camera moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved walkway alongside historic building facade

events.description: camera turns right to follow the building facade, moving from frontal to lateral view

agents.ego_description: turning right at the building corner and walking along the stone facade with windows and shutters

entered.detail: rows of shuttered windows on the stone building wall passing by at close range
smooth paved stone surface replacing the gravel path

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the corner of the historic building and proceeds along its facade. The gravel gives way to a paved walkway as the building wall dominates the right side of the frame with its detailed stonework and shuttered windows. The water view shifts to the left and becomes more distant.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach waterfront with panoramic bay views

events.description: rounding the building corner to reveal expansive open waterfront and beach area
turning left to follow the shoreline away from the building

agents.ego_description: exploring the open beach area with panoramic views of the water, turning left to follow the shoreline toward distant trees

entered.detail: sandy beach area with wet patches along the waterline
tree-covered islands visible across the calm bay
tall palm trees and cypress trees lining the distant shore

segments.scene_description: Rounding the final corner, the scene opens to a wide sandy beach with panoramic views of the calm bay and distant tree-covered islands. The historic building recedes into the background on the right as the camera turns left to follow the shoreline, with palm trees and lush vegetation visible ahead along the coast.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet waterfront approach toward a wide, panoramic coastal vista. It begins by moving steadily along a gravel path toward a large historic stone building, passing a small yellow structure nestled among trees while calm waters reflect the clear sky. As the camera reaches the building, it turns right to follow the detailed stonework and shuttered windows of the facade, with the gravel transitioning into a paved walkway. The scene then opens wide as the camera rounds the final corner, leaving the building behind to reveal a sandy beach and a bay dotted with distant, tree-covered islands. Finally, the view shifts left to follow the shoreline, gliding toward palm trees and lush vegetation under the bright Mediterranean sun.
